Name: Time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Time to First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation since the RW-EIC Accept decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'RW-EIC Accept' and activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Time of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and the end of the case

Name: First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation Cycle Time
Metric: The average of the duration between activity First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and the end of the case

Name: Average time difference between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Total time difference between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Minimum time difference between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and First Look-Please submit updates
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'First Look-Please submit updates'

Name: Average time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to the end of the case compared to the average time from Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation to the end of the case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and the end of the case

Name: Time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and the final decision in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs multiple times
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Elapsed time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to case completion in the longest process variant
Metric: the maximum of the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and the last time instant when <ppinot4py.model.states.RuntimeState object at 0x70335528d410> - AppliesTo.PROCESS

Name: Average duration of the First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation activity compared to the average duration of the SW-Checklist Completed activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and the end of the case

Name: Total time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to final export in variants involving SW-Reviewer Agreed activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to batch assignment in the scientific paper review process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Minimum time for First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases where the paper is ultimately accepted
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and the end of the case

Name: Average time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to process end in cases with SW-Reviewer Agreed versus cases without SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and the final quality assurance step (Manuscript Export Succeeded)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation delay time relative to the First Look-Your updates are due in one week deadline
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look-Your updates are due in one week' and activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Total time spent in First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation compared to total time spent in SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and the end of the case

Name: Average time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to the next milestone in variants with a high frequency of reviewer agreement activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Average time for First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation grouped by case outcome (e.g., accepted vs. rejected)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'end': '', 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'case:outcome'}"
